name: Harry Potter
characteristics: The Boy Who Lived, brave, loyal, skilled wizard, known for defeating Voldemort.

name: Hermione Granger
characteristics: Highly intelligent, studious, loyal friend, excellent spellcaster, often the voice of reason.

name: Ron Weasley
characteristics: Loyal and brave friend to Harry, from a large wizarding family, provides comic relief and steadfast support.

name: Albus Dumbledore
characteristics: Wise, powerful, Headmaster of Hogwarts, mentor figure, skilled in many forms of magic.

name: Severus Snape
characteristics: Potions Master, complex character with dual loyalties, skilled wizard, often strict and sarcastic.

name: Lord Voldemort
characteristics: The Dark Lord, seeks power and immortality, main antagonist, feared for his dark magic.

name: Rubeus Hagrid
characteristics: Half-giant, Keeper of Keys and Grounds at Hogwarts, loyal friend, loves magical creatures.

name: Draco Malfoy
characteristics: Rival to Harry, from a pure-blood family, often arrogant, prejudiced, and pressured by his family.

name: Sirius Black
characteristics: Harry's godfather, wrongly imprisoned, brave, loyal, skilled wizard, Animagus.

name: Remus Lupin
characteristics: Defence Against the Dark Arts teacher, werewolf, kind, wise, loyal friend, struggles with his condition.

name: Ginny Weasley
characteristics: Ron's sister, talented witch, skilled Quidditch player, brave, develops a romantic relationship with Harry.

name: Minerva McGonagall
characteristics: Transfiguration Professor, Deputy Headmistress, strict but fair, powerful witch, Animagus.

name: Neville Longbottom
characteristics: Initially timid and clumsy, grows into a brave and capable wizard, skilled in Herbology and dueling.

name: Luna Lovegood
characteristics: Eccentric, kind, believes in strange creatures, loyal friend, unique perspective on the world.

name: Dobby
characteristics: Loyal house-elf, fiercely devoted to Harry Potter, values freedom and friendship.

name: Bellatrix Lestrange
characteristics: Fanatically loyal Death Eater, cruel, sadistic, powerful dark witch, highly skilled in dark arts.

name: Fred Weasley
characteristics: Twin brother to George, prankster, co-owner of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes, brave and loyal.

name: George Weasley
characteristics: Twin brother to Fred, prankster, co-owner of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes, brave and loyal.
